title: fix(deps): update module github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/v3 to v3.1.0
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>mistifyio/go-zfs (github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/v3)</summary>

### [`v3.1.0`](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/releases/tag/v3.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/compare/v3.0.1...v3.1.0)

#### What's Changed

- test: Update ZoL default to compression=on by [@​trisk](https://redirect.github.com/trisk) in [#​94](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/94)
- Update outdated Mergify config by [@​trisk](https://redirect.github.com/trisk) in [#​95](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/95)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.0.0-20211213223007-03aa0b5f6827 to 0.1.0 in /tooling by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​89](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/89)
- Make Mergify squash PRs by [@​trisk](https://redirect.github.com/trisk) in [#​96](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/96)
- Revert "Make Mergify squash PRs" by [@​trisk](https://redirect.github.com/trisk) in [#​97](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/97)
- Support timeout for commands by [@​antonag32](https://redirect.github.com/antonag32) in [#​93](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/93)

#### New Contributors

- [@​trisk](https://redirect.github.com/trisk) made their first contribution in [#​94](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/94)
- [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] made their first contribution in [#​89](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/89)
- [@​antonag32](https://redirect.github.com/antonag32) made their first contribution in [#​93](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/93)

#### Shortlog

```
Albert Lee (4):
      test: Update ZoL default to compression=on
      Update outdated Mergify config
      Make Mergify squash PRs
      Revert "Make Mergify squash PRs"

Manuel Mendez (2):
      Fence release notes diffstat and shortlog inside code blocks

antonag32 (1):
      Support timeout for commands

dependabot[bot] (1):
      build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys in /tooling
```
